product.name: ArDura 1000 Kirik Dimi
product.familyDescriptorPl: Tkaniny PA 6.6 — warianty powlekane, FR i wzmocnione
product.familyDescriptorEn: PA 6.6 fabrics — coated, FR and reinforced variants
product.categorySourceGroup: Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.
product.titleDescriptor: Pa6.6 woven cross twill fabric for military equipment
product.specLine: 300 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Cross Twill Woven Fabric
descriptions: ArDura 1000 Kirik Dimi is heavyweight 100% polyamide 6.6 cross twill woven fabric for military equipment.
The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for military and police bags.
The fabric has water and oil repellent function.
It's used mostly for application which requires ultra durability.
The antibacterial function is very usefull to eliminate all kind of odor formation during work.
The cross twill weaving structure gives extra comfort to the wearer.
Pa6.6 woven cross twill fabric for military equipment
300 g/m², 100% Pa 6.6, Water Repellent, Antibacterial, Cross Twill Woven Fabric
technicalParameters: Tensile Strength | Warp>3000N; Weft>2500N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>250N; Weft>200N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants | EN ISO 14362-1
Allergenic Dyestuffs | Not Detected | EN ISO 14362-1

evidence: titleDescriptor: 'Pa6.6 woven cross twill fabric for military equipment'
descriptions: 'ArDura 1000 Kirik Dimi is heavyweight 100% polyamide 6.6 cross twill woven fabric for military equipment.'
descriptions: 'The Pa6.6 high tenacity fibers gives for extra protection for military and police bags.'
categorySourceGroup: 'Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.'
acceptedMatches.rationale: Product is explicitly and repeatedly described as intended for military equipment and police use across title, description and technical parameters, meeting the direct-evidence bar for the military application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: The product explicitly lists 'hi-vis' as a property and cites EN ISO 20471, the standard for high-visibility warning clothing, directly supporting a hi-vis application even though narrative text focuses on military use.
Antibacterial property and function icon are present, but no medical/healthcare use is explicitly stated anywhere in the product data.

CategorySourceGroup mentions 'motorcyclists' as part of the broader PA6.6 uniform category, but the product-specific descriptions and title only reference military and police use, not motorcycle apparel explicitly.

evidence: titleDescriptor: 'Pa6.6 woven cross twill fabric for military equipment'
descriptions: 'ArDura 1000 Kirik Dimi is heavyweight 100% polyamide 6.6 cross twill woven fabric for military equipment.'
categorySourceGroup: 'Woven PA.6.6 fabrics for police uniforms, motorcyclists, bomb disposal suits and technical military applications.'
primary.rationale: The product is repeatedly and explicitly described as intended for military equipment, with dedicated 'Application' field confirming this as the dominant, direct commercial use.

secondary.rationale: Although 'hi-vis' is listed as a property and EN ISO 20471 is cited, there is no explicit statement that this fabric is used for certified high-visibility warning garments; it appears as a generic property rather than a stated end use. Motorcycle use is only implied via the broader category source group, not the product-specific text, so it does not meet the bar for an independent secondary application.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Hi-vis property and EN ISO 20471 standard are listed, but no explicit hi-vis garment application is stated for this specific product; property/standard alone insufficient per rules.
Motorcyclists mentioned only in the broader category source group, not in product-specific title or descriptions, which focus solely on military/police use.
Antibacterial property present but no medical/healthcare use explicitly stated.
